sections.paragraph:
διπλόω 1 aor. ἐδίπλωσα (since X., Hell. 6, 5, 19) to double τὰ διπλᾶ pay back double Rv 18:6 (Cp. the adj. διπλοῦς PYadin 5a ii, 9 and n. p. 40.)—DELG s.v. διπλόο.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

adj. adj. = adjective

PYadin PYadin = The Documents from the Bar Kokhba Period named in honor of YYadin (a.k.a. PBabatha)—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 252
